item.title: Medtronic Perfusion Systems: Medtronic DLP Retrograde Cannula Manual-Inflate Silicone Body 15FR, Model 94725; Cardiopulmonary bypass vascular catheter Recall
item.product: Medtronic DLP Retrograde Cannula Manual-Inflate Silicone Body 15FR, Model 94725; Cardiopulmonary bypass vascular catheter
item.summary: Certain lots of product have the potential for a sterile barrier breach. Product details: Medtronic DLP Retrograde Cannula Manual-Inflate Silicone Body 15FR, Model 94725; Cardiopulmonary bypass vascular catheter
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide distribution - US Nationwide and the countries of Australia, Austria, Belgium, Canada, China, Colombia, Costa Rica, Cyprus, Denmark, France, Germany, Hong Kong, Hungary, Italy, Japan, Latvia, Lithuania, Malaysia, Moldova, Republic Of, Morocco, Netherlands, Norway, Panama, Poland, Russia, Serbia, Singapore, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, Suriname, Sweden, Taiwan, Thailand, Turkey, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States, Uruguay, Vietnam.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
